sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPTLEVEL, DEPT_CD_PATH, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 1,# v_CN#, #v_LDAPPATH#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADFLAG, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 'Y', #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_EXTATTR4#, #v_EXTATTR5#, #v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR8#, #v_EXTATTR9#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR15#, 'Y', #v_LDAPPATH#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER USING ( SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, B.COMPNM2, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, B.Dept_CD_Path || ',' || TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AS pos_5 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER , ( SELECT B.* FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON B.CN = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) B WHERE TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) src ON ( TBL_DEPTMASTER.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 = src.CompNm2, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = src.extensionAttribute2, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = src.extensionAttribute3, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DEPT_CD_PATH = pos_5
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, SIPURI, UPDATEDT, BIRTH, BIRTHTYPE, PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_MAILNICKNAME#, #v_UPNNAME#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_TITLE#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_TELEPHONE#, #v_HOMEPHONE#, #v_FAX#, #v_MOBILE#, #v_POSTALCODE#, #v_ADDRESS#, #v_EXTATTR1#,#v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR102#, #v_EXTATTR14#, #v_EXTATTR15#, #v_LDAPPATH#, #v_MAIL#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_BIRTH#, #v_BIRTHTYPE#, #v_PASS#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOB WHERE USERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOB2 WHERE USERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = NULL WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPNM2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , DEPTLEVEL + 1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET COMPNM2 = #v_COMPNM2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, DEPTLEVEL = #v_DEPTLEVEL#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN#, DEPT_CD_PATH = #v_DEPT_CD_PATH# || ',' || CN WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET DEPT_CD_PATH = REPLACE(DEPT_CD_PATH, #v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD#, #v_DEPT_CD_PATH# || ',' || #v_CN#) WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE #v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD# || ',%'
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_USERMASTER B USING ( SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.DEPARTMENT AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) src ON ( B.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET COMPANY = src.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPANY2 = COMPNM2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = src.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND EndDate > to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') ) > 0

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_USERMASTER USING ( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER ) src ON ( TBL_USERMASTER.ROWID = src.ROW_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DESCRIPTION = src.DISPLAYNAME, DESCRIPTION2 = src.DISPLAYNAME2
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, DESCRIPTION3, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE, MOBILE_NOTUSE, MOBILE_PIN, SIPURI,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DisplayName , DisplayName2 , mail , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') , MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI , PASSWORD , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBLADDJOB WHERE USERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBLADDJOB2 WHERE USERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = NULL WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = NULL WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top' ) A ORDER BY A.CN

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , mail , TelephoneNumber , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, null) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT * FROM TBLPROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.CN , A.DEPTID , A.POSITIONCD , CASE '1' WHEN '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE B.COMPNM2 END COMPANYNAME , A.TITLE T1 , A.TITLE2 T2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.CN = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY B.DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ( CN, DEPTID, TITLE, TITLE2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TITLE1#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS TITLE, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME) AS ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#
SELECT COUNT(CN)TOTALCNT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , REPLACE(SUBSTR(UpdateDT,1,10),'.','') UPDATEDT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_ROWPERPAGE# * (#v_PAGE# - 1) ) AND ROWNUM <= #v_ROWPERPAGE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER ( CN, DisplayName, DisplayName2, mail, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, Department, Description, Description2, Description3, PhysicalDeliveryOfficeName, Company, Company2, Title, Title2, TelephoneNumber, HomePhone, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, Mobile, postalcode, streetaddress, info, extensionAttribute1, extensionAttribute2, extensionAttribute3, extensionAttribute4, extensionAttribute5, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, extensionAttribute102, extensionAttribute11, extensionAttribute12, extensionAttribute13, extensionAttribute14, extensionAttribute15, ADSPath, UpdateDT, Mobile_Enable, Mobile_NotUse, Mobile_PIN, SIPURI ,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI, PASSWORD, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_USERMASTER USING ( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) src ON ( TBL_USERMASTER.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION = src.DisplayName, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2 = src.DisplayName2, TBL_USERMASTER.COMPANY = src.extensionAttribute3, TBL_USERMASTER.COMPANY2 = src.CompNm2, TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = src.extensionAttribute2
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(DISPLAYNAME2, ' ') as displayName2 , NVL(TITLE2, ' ') as title2, NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, ' ') as extensionAttribute102 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET DISPLAYNAME2 = DISPLAYNAME WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET TITLE2 = TITLE WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 = EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISPLAYNAME as displayName, DISPLAYNAME2 as displayName2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_USERMASTER B USING ( SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, A.COMPNM2, A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = #v_PARENTCN# AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) src ON ( B.ROWID = src.ROW_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET COMPANY = src.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPANY2 = src.COMPNM2, DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN#, DESCRIPTION = #v_DEPTNAME#, DESCRIPTION2 = #v_DEPTNAME2#, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = src.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT a.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER a INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER b ON a.department=b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id ORDER BY cn
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# mail = #mail# extensionattribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionattribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionattribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionattribute4 = #extensionAttribute4# extensionattribute5 = #extensionAttribute5# extensionattribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionattribute7 = #extensionAttribute7# extensionattribute8 = #extensionAttribute8# extensionattribute9 = #extensionAttribute9# extensionattribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionattribute11 = #extensionAttribute11# extensionattribute12 = #extensionAttribute12# extensionattribute13 = #extensionAttribute13# extensionattribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionattribute15 = #extensionAttribute15#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# title= #title# title2 = #title2# extensionAttribute15 = #extensionAttribute15# extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionAttribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionAttribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionAttribute102 = #extensionAttribute102# telephoneNumber = #telephoneNumber# homePhone = #homePhone# facsimileTelephoneNumber = #facsimileTelephoneNumber# mobile = #mobile# postalCode = #postalCode# streetAddress = #streetAddress# birthType = #birthType# birth = #birth# info = #info#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET mail = #MAIL# WHERE cn = #CN# AND tenant_id = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = #v_CN# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
